title: Video MPI
subtitle: Record a multipoint walkthrough, capture findings, generate a customer report, and send a secure link.
transcriptPlaceholder: Speak while recording — English or Spanish. The customer report is always written in English.
checklistHint: Mark each system OK, recommend, or urgent — notes optional.
smsDisabled: SMS is not configured — copy the link instead
captureHints: Opens fullscreen when possible, keeps the screen awake, and saves even on flaky bay Wi‑Fi.
offlineBanner: You are offline. New videos will queue on this device until you reconnect.
queuedOffline: Saved on this device — will upload when online
recordingEmpty: Recording was empty — try again or upload a file
recordingStarted: Recording — tap the red stop button when finished
attachRepairOrderHint: Optional. Links this video to an open RO so it shows on the RO detail and customer report workflow.
noVideoYet: No video file on this inspection yet — record or upload one.
roVideosEmpty: No video inspections linked to this RO yet.
recorderReadyHint: Tap the red button to start. Use the rear camera for walkarounds when available.
tapRecordToStart: Tap the red button to start recording
tapRecordToOpen: Tap the red button to open the camera and start recording
